source_file: Jailbreaking Black Box Large Language Models in Twenty Queries
title: Jailbreaking Black Box Large Language Models in Twenty Queries
contributions_summary: PAIR introduces a novel, black-box jailbreaking algorithm that efficiently generates semantic, human-interpretable prompt-level attacks using fewer than twenty queries—over 250 times more efficient than prior methods like GCG—while achieving high success rates across major LLMs including GPT-3.5/4, Vicuna, and Gemini-Pro. Through an iterative, attacker-LLM-driven refinement process inspired by social engineering, PAIR autonomously improves jailbreak prompts without human intervention, leveraging chain-of-thought assessments to enhance both effectiveness and interpretability. Its CPU-only operation, low memory footprint, and strong transferability make it uniquely accessible for scalable red teaming, while its output format enables direct integration into safety fine-tuning pipelines through curated jailbreaking datasets.
